ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "debut_date" TEXT /* Date of the player's first professional game */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the player */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Player's batting style (left, right, or both) */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Player's throwing style (left or right) */,
  "drafted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the player was drafted */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win/loss) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (regular season, playoff, or World Series) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the team */,
  "established" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "relocation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team relocated */,
  "previous_names" TEXT /* List of previous names for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "league" TEXT /* League of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (regular or postseason) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game statistic */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "stint" INTEGER /* Stint played by the player */,
  "Glf" INTEGER /* Games pitched in the league */,
  "Gcf" INTEGER /* Games caught in the field */,
  "Grf" INTEGER /* Games played in the field */,
  "PA" INTEGER /* Number of plate appearances */,
  "AB" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "R" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "H" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "HR" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "RBI" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in */,
  "SB" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "CS" INTEGER /* Number of caught stealing */,
  "BB" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "SO" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player season statistic */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "G" INTEGER /* Games played by the player */,
  "GF" INTEGER /* Games finished by the player */,
  "GS" INTEGER /* Games started by the player */,
  "avg" REAL /* Batting average for the season */,
  "OBP" REAL /* On-base percentage for the season */,
  "SLG" REAL /* Slugging percentage for the season */,
  "OPS" REAL /* On-base plus slugging for the season */,
  "WAR" REAL /* Wins above replacement for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., MVP, Cy Young, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_position_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player position history */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the player's position */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the player's position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_position_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_position_history_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES player_positions ("position_id")
)
